description_long: This is a vintage-style, upright fire extinguisher with a cylindrical red metal body and a yellow top section. The front features a large, aged label with the word 'FOAM' and a flame symbol, along with additional text and safety markings. A long, black hose with a yellow nozzle is attached to the side, secured by metal brackets, and loops up to the top where it connects to a yellow valve assembly. The top of the extinguisher has a prominent circular handle and a protective cage around the valve. The surface shows signs of wear, with visible scuffs and faded paint, suggesting frequent use or age. The overall design is robust, functional, and clearly intended for emergency use in public or industrial urban settings.
description: A tall, cylindrical red and yellow fire extinguisher with a large front label, side hose, and a circular handle on top. The surface is worn and aged, emphasizing its utilitarian emergency function.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large yellow label with 'FOAM' text, flame symbol, and the attached hose running vertically along the side.
description_view_1: Side view with the label partially visible and the hose mostly hidden, highlighting the plain red cylindrical body and yellow top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full length of the black hose attached to the side, with no label visible and the yellow top handle prominent.
description_view_3: Angled rear view showing the hose attachment points and the back of the yellow top handle, with the label just out of sight.
attribute_label_or_signage: Large yellow label with 'FOAM', flame symbol, and additional text on the front of the cylinder.
attribute_hose_or_nozzle: Long black hose with a yellow nozzle attached to the side, secured by brackets, running from the top to near the base.
